seoTitle: Swan Vale vs Swanhaven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swan Vale and Swanhaven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swan Vale vs Swanhaven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swan Vale and Swanhaven.
heading: Swan Vale vs Swanhaven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swan Vale, New South Wales and Swanhaven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swan Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Swanhaven (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swan Vale or Swanhaven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swan Vale has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Swanhaven scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swan Vale scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Swanhaven scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swan Vale or Swanhaven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swan Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
